description: Live Pulse -- fast intraday stress layer. Polls SPY/VIX/DXY/MOVE live quotes every 15 min during US market hours, computes a 0-100 pulse weighted (35/30/15/20), compares vs morning GSI for intraday drift. Telegram tripwire.

eventbridge_scheduler.description: Live Pulse -- every 15 min during US market hours (13:00-21:00 UTC, Mon-Fri).
